hero.headline: New ways to organize and build together.
hero.subStatement: Parti Design is a multidisciplinary architecture and design studio. We develop regenerative places through digital, physical and social systems.

digital.label: Digital
digital.heading: Tools for communities to grow
digital.body: Websites, platforms, digital services, UX/UI design. Building the tools communities and organisations need to organise and grow.
digital.examples: e.g. Massvis platform, Klondyke Farms website

physical.label: Physical
physical.heading: Spaces that people want to be in
physical.body: Architecture, spatial design, co-building workshops. Designing and constructing spaces that people want to be in.
physical.examples: e.g. DIT Egnahem, Rewilding Sweden pavilion

social.label: Social
social.heading: Bringing communities together
social.body: Co-design facilitation, workshops, placemaking consulting. Bringing people together to shape the places they live in.
social.examples: e.g. Umeå Together, Kajeka student housing

work.pageDescription: Projects across architecture, digital design, co-building, and community facilitation.

studio.heading: An architecture studio that builds differently.
studio.body1: Founded in 2022 by Kasimir and Karina while still studying — as a vessel for their creative, research, and community interests. The name means three things: participatory design, the French concept diagram that drives an architectural idea, and a refusal to take architecture too seriously.
studio.quote: Citizens are the experts of place.
studio.body2: They work holistically — a single project might combine architecture, workshop facilitation, branding, and a website. The studio operates as both a practice and a venture studio, incubating its own initiatives alongside client work.
studio.photoAlt: Karina and Kasimir — founders of Parti Design

ventures.teaser: We don't just respond to briefs — we initiate.
ventures.body: Alongside client work, Parti Design incubates its own projects: initiatives we believe in and build ourselves.
ventures.pageDescription: Alongside client work, Parti Design incubates its own projects: Massvis, Umeå Kallbad, and DIT Egnahem.

byggemenskap.heading: Building homes together.
byggemenskap.body: Byggemenskap — community self-build housing — is one of the most powerful tools for affordable, community-rooted housing. Parti Design offers end-to-end support: from forming the organisation to designing and co-building the home.

closingCta.heading: Let's build something together.
closingCta.body: Whether you have a brief, an idea, or just a question — reach out.

contact.heading: Let's build something together.
contact.body: Whether you have a brief, a rough idea, or just a question — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.byggemenskapHeading: Thinking about building a home together?
contact.byggemenskapBody: We offer end-to-end support for community self-build housing groups — from forming the cooperative to designing and co-building the home. Reach out and let's talk.
contact.replyNote: We usually reply within a couple of days. For urgent matters, email directly.
contact.pageDescription: Get in touch with Parti Design — architecture, digital design, and co-building.

contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, idea, or question...
contactForm.successBody: We usually reply within a couple of days.

home.title: Parti Design — Architecture, Design & Co-building
home.description: A multidisciplinary architecture and design studio developing regenerative places through digital, physical and social systems. Based in Umeå, Sweden.

studio_page.pageDescription: Parti Design is a multidisciplinary architecture and design studio founded in 2022 by Kasimir and Karina in Umeå, Sweden.

header.heading: Work that builds places and communities.
header.body: Projects across architecture, digital design, co-building, and community facilitation — often all at once.

cta.heading: Have a project in mind?
cta.body: We work with municipalities, developers, community organisations, and individuals. Reach out — we'd love to hear about your project.

header.heading: An architecture studio that builds differently.
header.body: Founded in 2022 in Umeå, Sweden. We work at the intersection of architecture, digital design, and community facilitation.

about.heading: The studio.
about.body1a: Parti Design was founded in 2022 by Kasimir and Karina while still studying — as a vessel for their creative, research, and community interests. The name means three things: participatory design, the French
about.body1b: (the concept diagram that drives an architectural idea), and a refusal to take architecture too seriously.
about.quote: Citizens are the experts of place.
about.body2: The studio operates as both a practice and a venture studio — incubating its own initiatives alongside client work. A single project might combine architecture, workshop facilitation, branding, and a website. That's not a coincidence; it's the point.
about.body3: Based in Umeå, Sweden — but we work wherever the project takes us.
about.photoAlt: Karina and Kasimir — founders of Parti Design

team.heading: The team.
team.kasimir: Architecture, digital development, and co-building. Kasimir leads technical design, construction projects, and digital platforms. He has a particular interest in open-source building systems and community land models.
team.karina: Architecture, graphic design, and facilitation. Karina leads visual communication, co-design processes, and spatial design. She brings a sharp eye for aesthetics and a deep commitment to participatory methods.

participatory.label: Participatory
participatory.body: We believe communities are the experts of their own places. Every project begins by listening.

holistic.label: Holistic
holistic.body: A single project might combine architecture, facilitation, branding, and a website. We work across the whole problem.

regenerative.label: Regenerative
regenerative.body: We design for long-term flourishing, not short-term delivery. Buildings and platforms should outlast the brief.

open.label: Open
open.body: We share methods, use open-source tools, and work in public where we can. Good ideas spread further when they're shared.

architecture.label: Architecture
architecture.body: New buildings, spatial interventions, co-building workshops, WikiHouse construction, byggemenskap support.

digital.label: Digital
digital.body: Websites, platforms, digital services, UX/UI design, community tools, and product development.

social.label: Social
social.body: Co-design facilitation, community engagement, placemaking strategy, workshop series, and grant consulting.

cta.heading: Let's work together.
cta.body: Whether you have a brief, a rough idea, or a community problem that needs solving — we'd love to hear from you.

header.heading: We don't just respond to briefs — we initiate.
header.body: Alongside client work, Parti Design incubates its own projects: initiatives we believe in and build ourselves.

why.heading: Why a venture studio?
why.body1: Client work keeps us sharp, but the things we believe in most — community finance, open-source housing, urban cold bathing — rarely arrive as a brief. So we make them ourselves.
why.body2: Each venture is a real project that we invest our own time, design, and relationships into. Some grow into independent organisations; others fold back into the studio's service offer. All of them sharpen how we think.
why.quote: The best projects we've been part of started with a question, not a budget.
